message:
🐛 Switch to clean GA4 property to eliminate spam (#1300)

The old measurement ID (G-QPGNKGNNY2) was scraped by spammers who
send events directly to google-analytics.com, bypassing our proxy.
Switch to a fresh property (G-PXWNVQ8D1T) that has never been
exposed in client-side code — only the server-side proxy knows it.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
